source_intake_record.raw_question_text: 图示的电路中，$t<0$ 时，电容器充电过程已完成。$t=0$ 时，接通电键 K 。将接通前瞬间时刻记为 $t=0^{-}$，接通后瞬间时刻记为 $t=0^{+} . t \geqslant 0^{+}$时，按图中虚线所示方向设定各路电流 $I_{1}, I_{2}, I_{C}$ 和 $I_{3}$ 的流向。导出任意 $t=0^{+}$时刻的 $I_{1}(t)$ 。

image_dependency: question_text explicitly says '图示的电路中' and refers to current directions '按图中虚线所示方向', so the setup depends on the diagram
multi_step: question asks to derive a time-dependent current expression I1(t), not just read a value
answer_text is a nontrivial analytic formula with resistance combinations and an exponential term
the problem mentions initial conditions at t=0^- and t=0^+, which indicates transient-process reasoning across multiple conditions
verifiability: answer_text gives an explicit closed-form expression for I1(t), which is more checkable than free-form explanation
registry_passed=true, so core assets and text/answer registration succeeded
verification may still require symbolic equivalence handling because the answer is a formula rather than a simple numeric result

candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: 图示的电路中，$t<0$ 时，电容器充电过程已完成。$t=0$ 时，接通电键 K 。将接通前瞬间时刻记为 $t=0^{-}$，接通后瞬间时刻记为 $t=0^{+} . t \geqslant 0^{+}$时，按图中虚线所示方向设定各路电流 $I_{1}, I_{2}, I_{C}$ 和 $I_{3}$ 的流向。导出任意 $t=0^{+}$时刻的 $I_{1}(t)$ 。

metadata.reasoning_chain:
由
$$
\begin{array}{l}
\varepsilon=I_{1} R_{1}+I_{2} R_{2}, 
I_{1}=I_{2}+I_{3}+I_{C}, \quad \Rightarrow \quad \varepsilon=I_{2}\left(R_{1}+R_{2}\right)+I_{3} R_{1}+I_{C} R_{1}, 
I_{3} R_{3}=I_{2} R_{2}, \quad \Rightarrow \quad \varepsilon=\frac{R_{1} R_{2}+R_{2} R_{3}+R_{3} R_{1}}{R_{3}} I_{2}+I_{C} R_{1}, 
I_{2} R_{2}=Q / C, \quad \Rightarrow \quad \varepsilon=\frac{R_{1} R_{2}+R_{2} R_{3}+R_{3} R_{1}}{C R_{2} R_{3}} Q+I_{C} R_{1}, 
I_{C}=\mathrm{d} Q / \mathrm{d} t, \quad \Rightarrow \quad \varepsilon=\frac{R_{1} R_{2}+R_{2} R_{3}+R_{3} R_{1}}{C R_{2} R_{3}} Q+R_{1} \frac{\mathrm{~d} Q}{\mathrm{~d} t},
\end{array}
$$

得
$$
\frac{\mathrm{d} Q}{\mathrm{~d} t}=-(A Q-B), \quad\left\{\begin{array}{l}
A=\frac{R_{1} R_{2}+R_{2} R_{3}+R_{3} R_{1}}{C R_{1} R_{2} R_{3}}, 
B=\varepsilon / R_{1} .
\end{array}\right.
$$
$Q(t)$ 的求解：
$$
\int_{Q(0^{+})}^{Q(t)} \frac{\mathrm{d} Q}{A Q-B}=\int_{0^{+}}^{t}-\mathrm{d} t, \Rightarrow \frac{1}{A} \ln \frac{A Q-B}{A Q(0^{+})-B}=-t,
$$

得
$$
\begin{array}{c}
Q(t)=\left[Q(0^{+})-\frac{B}{A}\right] \mathrm{e}^{-A t}+\frac{B}{A} 
\Rightarrow \quad Q(t)=\frac{R_{2}}{R_{1} R_{2}+R_{2} R_{3}+R_{3} R_{1}} C \varepsilon\left(\frac{R_{1} R_{2}}{R_{1}+R_{2}} \mathrm{e}^{-A t}+R_{3}\right) .
\end{array}
$$
$I_{2}(t), I_{3}(t)$ 的求解：
$$
\begin{array}{c}
I_{2}=Q / C R_{2} \Rightarrow I_{2}(t)=\frac{\varepsilon}{R_{1} R_{2}+R_{2} R_{3}+R_{3} R_{1}}\left(\frac{R_{1} R_{2}}{R_{1}+R_{2}} \mathrm{e}^{-A t}+R_{3}\right), 
I_{3}=\frac{R_{2}}{R_{3}} I_{2}, \quad \Rightarrow \quad I_{3}(t)=\frac{R_{2} \varepsilon}{R_{3}\left(R_{1} R_{2}+R_{2} R_{3}+R_{3} R_{1}\right)}\left(\frac{R_{1} R_{2}}{R_{1}+R_{2}} \mathrm{e}^{-\alpha}+R_{3}\right) .
\end{array}
$$
$I_{C}(t), I_{1}(t)$ 的求解：
$$
\begin{aligned}
I_{C}=\frac{\mathrm{d} Q}{\mathrm{~d} t}, & \Rightarrow I_{C}(t)=\frac{-R_{2} \varepsilon}{R_{3}\left(R_{1}+R_{2}\right)} \mathrm{e}^{-A}, 
I_{1}=I_{2}+I_{3}+I_{C}, \quad \Rightarrow \quad I_{1}(t) & =\frac{\varepsilon}{R_{1} R_{2}+R_{2} R_{3}+R_{3} R_{1}}\left[\left(R_{2}+R_{3}\right)-\frac{R_{2}^{2}}{R_{1}+R_{2}} \mathrm{e}^{-A t}\right] .
\end{aligned}
$$

node_records.canonical_value: metadata.image_paths contains a PIL object string representation instead of a concrete file path or URL
surface_forms: metadata.image_paths contains a PIL object string representation instead of a concrete file path or URL

normalized_value.flag: metadata.image_paths contains a PIL object string representation instead of a concrete file path or URL

agent_assessment.rationale: The text clearly states the circuit condition before and after closing switch K, defines the current directions, and asks for the derivation of I1(t). The image is necessary and provides a readable circuit topology with R1, R2, R3, capacitor C, source, nodes A/B, and switch K, so the intended physics problem and expected answer are understandable.

risk_flags: metadata.image_paths contains a PIL object string representation instead of a concrete file path or URL
cleaning_records.decision_rationale: The circuit problem is jointly understandable, the image is clear enough for the required topology, the target answer is fully available, and rewrite/alignment/solvability evidence indicates the sample is usable for annotation. The metadata image-path anomaly is non-blocking and does not prevent semantic use of the sample.

conflict_pairs.detail: 题目依赖图像，但题干中视觉锚点表达较弱。

field_audit_records.before_value: 图示的电路中，$t<0$ 时，电容器充电过程已完成。$t=0$ 时，接通电键 K 。将接通前瞬间时刻记为 $t=0^{-}$，接通后瞬间时刻记为 $t=0^{+} . t \geqslant 0^{+}$时，按图中虚线所示方向设定各路电流 $I_{1}, I_{2}, I_{C}$ 和 $I_{3}$ 的流向。导出任意 $t=0^{+}$时刻的 $I_{1}(t)$ 。
